extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Reading guide mapping LNCS topics (Process, Industry Analysis, Functional Maps) to sections, pages, and lectures.
extracted_json.summary_gist: A reading guide for the "Lecture Notes for Competitive Strategy" (LNCS) on Canvas. A diagram shows Company Analysis nested within Industry Analysis (e.g., Intel within the microprocessor industry). A table maps LNCS topics to sections/pages and lectures: (1) Process covering Company Analysis (L#4 next Tue), Industry Analysis (L#3 Intro), and Assessment/Evolution (L#4 Details) on pages 17-19 (Section 5); (2) Industry Analysis in Section 3 (pages 11-15) with a 5-step process, the main topic for today; and (3) Functional Maps in Section 4 (page 15) for L#3 and L#4. Item 2.2 directs reading the "Intel Case Study" and using the SPSP to solve HW#2 Prob #2, focusing on Industry Analysis for now.
